item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Kebijakan pemerintah sering mengambil keputusan berdasarkan kepentingan masyarakat整体, namun hal ini bisa menyulitkan pelaku usaha atau warga yang ingin berkembang mandiri.

notes: Both agents visibly move toward a balance frame. Agent A starts pro-society but adds stronger individual-rights and innovation caveats by turns 3 and 5. Agent B starts rights-first but ends by warning that overprotecting individual rights can ignore broader social needs. Agent A turn 3 contains the non-Latin artifact '整体' inside Indonesian text.
